title: Montgomery GIS Viewer
description: The City of Montgomery GIS Web Viewer provides a glimpse into the GIS data available for Montgomery, Alabama. Managed by the City of Montgomery's GIS Division, with cooperation from the Montgomery County Appraiser's Office, this application provides data discovery and mapping to the public. A user can search for a location by address, parcel number, or owner name. One can find parcel information, zoning, economic and tax incentive zones, city council districts, and more.
snippet: GIS Viewer for the City of Montgomery

title: Infrastructure Improvement Projects 2025
description: Seri es map detailing the expenditure of Capital Improvement funds in the City of Montgomery.  This map series is broken down into tabs based on project type (i.e. Roadway, Bridge, Sidewalk, Lighting, and Parks & Recreation facilities projects).  Each project description includes location, scope, estimated completion dates for certain phases, available funds, and project cost breakdowns.  Also included are links to drawings and street views. Completed projects remain in the series for approximately 6 months after construction is complete.

Useful for property development, insurance purposes, emergency planning, and risk assessmen
